statement.en: Etude du transfert potentiel de chlordécone de parcelles à parcelles par ruissellement et érosion

proposer: Jonathan Allongout, Thierry Bazajet, Rémi Bizeul et al.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a preprint (dated 2026-04-25, future-projected or recent) studying environmental contamination transfer mechanisms. The axiom is provisional because: (1) empirical validation pending peer review, (2) field measurements under real-world variability, (3) chlordécone (persistent organochlorine) behavior in soil-water systems requires experimental confirmation. The study's core claim (contaminant transfer via runoff/erosion) is theoretically sound but requires validation data.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 土壌毒性の過去が現在に重なり、水の動きと共に風景を汚す。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 汚染は区画から区画へ、目に見えない糸のように流れ、根付く。
